_comment: TEMPLATE -- Path B (self-hosted, headless) wiring for the Google Workspace extension. The setup agent copies this block into the DEPLOYMENT's .mcp.json (via _ext_wire_mcp) and replaces the <PLACEHOLDERS>; this file itself stays a placeholder template and is never the live config. Server: taylorwilsdon/google_workspace_mcp (`uvx workspace-mcp`), single-user/stdio. Secrets (OAuth client JSON + minted refresh token) live under ./secrets (gitignored, chmod 700/600) and are NEVER committed or propagated by cc-update.
_scope_model: workspace-mcp --permissions service:level (cumulative). ONLY services listed here register their tools + request their scopes. DEFAULT below: gmail:drafts (compose, never send) + calendar:full + drive:full + sheets:full + docs:full + forms:full -- so the agent can EDIT existing Sheets/Docs IN PLACE (not just create new files) and create Google Forms. Levels: gmail readonly->organize->drafts->send->full; every other service (drive/calendar/sheets/docs/forms/slides): readonly->full. To let the agent SEND email, change 'gmail:drafts' to 'gmail:send' (documented upgrade in SETUP.md, with the blast-radius warning). IMPORTANT: adding a service here REQUIRES re-minting the token so the new scope is consented -- re-run bin/gauth.sh with a matching PERMS (see SETUP.md), or the new tools 403 on write.
_verified_env: workspace-mcp reads GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET_PATH (client JSON), WORKSPACE_MCP_CREDENTIALS_DIR (token store), USER_GOOGLE_EMAIL (single-user default), OAUTHLIB_INSECURE_TRANSPORT=1 (local loopback callback). Do NOT use GOOGLE_OAUTH_CREDENTIALS -- that name is not read by this server.
